title_localized.text: Wireless power transfer with adaptive coil alignment

abstract_localized.text: A wireless charging system that detects receiver coil position and adjusts the field to maximize coupling efficiency.

claims_localized.text:
1. A wireless power transfer apparatus comprising a transmitter coil; a position sensor configured to detect a position of a receiver coil; and a controller configured to adjust a drive signal based on the detected position.
2. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the position sensor comprises a plurality of magnetic field sensors.
3. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the controller adjusts a frequency of the drive signal.

title_localized.text: Inductive charging device with coil position feedback

abstract_localized.text: An inductive charging device that determines relative coil alignment and regulates supplied power accordingly.

claims_localized.text:
1. An inductive charging device comprising a primary coil; a feedback unit arranged to determine a relative alignment between the primary coil and a secondary coil; and a regulation unit configured to control supplied power based on the determined alignment.
2. The device according to claim 1, wherein the feedback unit comprises an array of Hall-effect sensors.
